hooks.command: sh -lc 'root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; script="$root/scripts/memforge_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$script" ]; then script=""; for candidate in "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/cache/memforge/memory/*/scripts/memforge_hook.py; do [ -f "$candidate" ] || continue; if [ -z "$script" ] || [ "$candidate" -nt "$script" ]; then script="$candidate"; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$script" ]; then echo "MemForge hook script not found" >&2; exit 0; fi; exec python3 "$script" context --client claude-code'

sh -lc 'root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; script="$root/scripts/memforge_hook.py"; if [ ! -f "$script" ]; then script=""; for candidate in "$HOME"/.claude/plugins/cache/memforge/memory/*/scripts/memforge_hook.py; do [ -f "$candidate" ] || continue; if [ -z "$script" ] || [ "$candidate" -nt "$script" ]; then script="$candidate"; fi; done; fi; if [ -z "$script" ]; then echo "MemForge hook script not found" >&2; exit 0; fi; exec python3 "$script" submit-session --client claude-code'
